title: Jason is missing - have you seen him?
description: NATIONAL NEWS - Jason Govender has been...
bodyText:
NATIONAL NEWS - Jason Govender has been missing since 4 October 2024.

He reportedly left Durban with a friend, a truck driver who had gone to deliver goods in Cape Town.

On their way back to Durban on the morning of 4 October, Jason was missing. He does not own a cell phone and his family have been unable to locate him since.

The last place they apparently stayed in before leaving for Durban was Beaufort West Engen Truck stop, this was confirmed from camera footage on the premises.


> He might have gone missing somewhere along the N1 from Beaufort West to Bloemfontein.


"Your assistance in this matter will be highly appreciated. I have attached a copy of the missing persons flyer and humbly request you to please share this information and assist us in finding our loved one.

"If you do have any information or require any further information, please do not hesitate to contact us on the numbers on the flyer or any one of the following numbers."

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
